events.name: Golden State Warriors at Houston Rockets

headlines.description: — Pushed to the brink of elimination, the Houston Rockets delivered a playoff gem Wednesday night to beat the Golden State Warriors and keep their season alive.
headlines.shortLinkText: VanVleet and Thompson lead the way as Rockets avoid elimination, routing Warriors 131-116 in Game 5

events.name: Minnesota Timberwolves at Los Angeles Lakers

headlines.description: — The Minnesota Timberwolves spent Game 5 in a dismal shooting funk, providing the Los Angeles Lakers with ample opportunity to stave off playoff elimination.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rudy Gobert dominates small-ball Lakers and the Timberwolves advance with a 103-96 win in Game 5
